description: Anthropic builds advanced language models like Claude 3.5 Sonnet, Claude 3 Sonnet, Claude 3 Opus, and Claude 3 Haiku, balancing intelligence, speed, and cost for workloads from enterprise to rapid-response use cases.
name: Anthropic

description: Google's Gemini family is its most advanced general-purpose AI, built by Google DeepMind for multimodal use across text, code, images, audio, and video. It scales from data centers to mobile devices with strong efficiency and reach.
name: Google

description: GLM Coding Plan provides access to Zhipu AI models including GLM-5 and GLM-4.7 for coding tasks via a fixed-fee subscription.
name: GLM Coding Plan

description: Kimi Code from Moonshot AI provides access to Kimi models including K2.5 for coding tasks.
name: Kimi Code

description: OpenAI is a leading AI research lab whose GPT models advanced natural language processing, delivering high performance and strong value across research, business, and innovation.
name: OpenAI

description: DeepSeek focuses on AI research and applications. Its latest DeepSeek V4 family ships in Flash and Pro variants with a 1M context window and hybrid thinking — competitive with leading closed frontier models on reasoning and agent benchmarks.
name: DeepSeek

description: Xorbits Inference (Xinference) is an open-source platform that simplifies running and integrating AI models. It lets you run open-source LLMs, embedding models, and multimodal models locally or in the cloud to build powerful AI apps.
name: Xinference

description: Moonshot, from Moonshot AI (Beijing Moonshot Technology), offers multiple NLP models for use cases like content creation, research, recommendations, and medical analysis, with strong long-context and complex generation support.
name: Moonshot

description: Amazon Bedrock provides enterprises with advanced language and vision models, including Anthropic Claude and Meta Llama 3.1, spanning lightweight to high-performance options for text, chat, and image tasks.
name: Bedrock

description: Aliyun Bailian Coding Plan is a specialized AI coding service providing access to coding-optimized models from Qwen, GLM, Kimi, and MiniMax via a dedicated endpoint.
name: Aliyun Bailian Coding Plan

description: Google's Gemini family is its most advanced general-purpose AI, built by Google DeepMind for multimodal use across text, code, images, audio, and video. It scales from data centers to mobile devices, improving efficiency and deployment flexibility.
name: Vertex AI

description: Azure offers advanced AI models, including GPT-3.5 and GPT-4 series, for diverse data types and complex tasks with a focus on safe, reliable, and sustainable AI.
name: Azure OpenAI

description: Azure provides advanced AI models, including GPT-3.5 and GPT-4 series, for diverse data types and complex tasks with a focus on safe, reliable, and sustainable AI.
name: Azure AI

description: AiHubMix provides access to multiple AI models through a unified API.
name: AiHubMix

description: OpenRouter provides access to many frontier models from OpenAI, Anthropic, LLaMA, and more, letting users pick the best model and price for their use case.
name: OpenRouter

description: A generative media platform built for developers.
name: Fal

description: Ollama offers models across code generation, math, multilingual processing, and chat, supporting both enterprise and local deployments.
name: Ollama

description: Ollama Cloud provides managed inference with out-of-the-box access to the Ollama model library and OpenAI-compatible APIs.
name: Ollama Cloud

description: vLLM is a fast, easy-to-use library for LLM inference and serving.
name: vLLM

description: A powerful open-source workflow engine for image, video, and audio generation, supporting models like SD, FLUX, Qwen, Hunyuan, and WAN with node-based editing and private deployment.
name: ComfyUI

description: The Hugging Face Inference API offers a fast way to explore thousands of models for many tasks, giving instant access to high-performance models for prototyping and ML experimentation.
name: HuggingFace

description: Run serverless GPU-powered ML models across Cloudflare’s global network.
name: Cloudflare Workers AI

description: With GitHub Models, developers can build as AI engineers using industry-leading models.
name: GitHub

description: Access Claude, GPT, and Gemini models through your GitHub Copilot subscription.
name: GitHub Copilot

description: An open-source aggregation and routing platform for multiple AI services.
name: New API

description: A leading frontier AI research lab building the visual infrastructure of tomorrow.
name: Black Forest Labs

description: Novita AI offers flexible, reliable, cost-effective APIs for LLMs and image generation. It supports models like Llama 3 and Mistral and provides scalable, developer-friendly APIs for generative AI startups.
name: Novita

description: PPIO provides reliable, cost-effective open-model APIs, including DeepSeek, Llama, Qwen, and other leading models.
name: PPIO

description: 302.AI is a pay-as-you-go AI platform offering a broad catalog of AI APIs and online AI apps.
name: 302.AI

description: NVIDIA NIM provides containers for self-hosted, GPU-accelerated inference microservices across cloud, data centers, RTX AI PCs, and workstations for pre-trained and custom models.
name: Nvidia

description: Together AI delivers leading performance with innovative models, broad customization, rapid scaling, and straightforward deployment for enterprise needs.
name: Together AI

description: Fireworks AI provides advanced language model services with function calling and multimodal processing. Firefunction V2 (based on Llama-3) is optimized for function calls, chat, and instruction following, while FireLLaVA-13B supports mixed image-text inputs. Other notable models include the Llama and Mixtral families.
name: Fireworks AI

description: Groq’s LPU inference engine delivers standout benchmark performance with exceptional speed and efficiency, setting a high bar for low-latency, cloud-based LLM inference.
name: Groq

description: Perplexity provides advanced chat models, including Llama 3.1 variants, for online and offline use and complex NLP workloads.
name: Perplexity

description: Mistral offers advanced general, specialized, and research models for complex reasoning, multilingual tasks, and code generation, with function-calling for custom integrations.
name: Mistral

description: ModelScope is Alibaba Cloud’s model-as-a-service platform, offering a wide range of AI models and inference services.
name: ModelScope

description: AI21 Labs builds foundation models and AI systems for enterprises, accelerating generative AI in production.
name: Ai21Labs

description: Upstage builds AI models for business needs, including Solar LLM and Document AI, with chat APIs that support function calling, translation, embeddings, and domain-specific use cases.
name: Upstage

description: xAI builds AI to accelerate scientific discovery, with a mission to deepen humanity’s understanding of the universe.
name: xAI (Grok)

description: Founded in 2020, Jina AI is a leading search AI company. Its search stack includes vector models, rerankers, and small language models to build reliable, high-quality generative and multimodal search apps.
name: Jina AI

description: SambaNova Cloud lets developers use top open-source models with extremely fast inference.
name: SambaNova

description: Cohere delivers cutting-edge multilingual models, advanced retrieval, and AI workspaces for modern enterprises—all in one secure platform.
name: Cohere

description: v0 is a pair-programming assistant that turns natural-language ideas into code and UI for your project.
name: Vercel (v0)

description: Qwen is Alibaba Cloud's large-scale language model with strong understanding and generation, covering Q&A, writing, opinion expression, and code across many domains.
name: Aliyun Bailian

description: An enterprise all-in-one platform for foundation models and AI-native app development, offering end-to-end tooling for generative AI model and application workflows.
name: Wenxin

description: LLM Knowledge Engine Atomic Power provides end-to-end knowledge QA for enterprises and developers, with modular services like document parsing, chunking, embeddings, and multi-turn rewriting to assemble custom AI solutions.
name: TencentCloud

description: A Tencent-developed LLM with strong Chinese writing, solid reasoning in complex contexts, and reliable task execution.
name: Hunyuan

description: ZhiPu AI provides an open platform for multimodal and language models across text processing, image understanding, and coding assistance.
name: ZhiPu

description: SiliconCloud is a cost-effective GenAI cloud service built on strong open-source base models.
name: SiliconCloud

description: 01.AI drives a human-centered AI 2.0 revolution, using LLMs to create economic and social value and build new AI ecosystems and business models.
name: 01.AI

description: iFLYTEK Spark provides powerful multilingual AI across domains, enabling innovations in smart hardware, healthcare, finance, and other verticals.
name: Spark

description: SenseNova delivers efficient, easy-to-use full-stack LLM services backed by SenseTime infrastructure.
name: SenseNova

description: Stepfun models offer leading multimodal and complex reasoning capabilities, with long-context understanding and powerful autonomous search orchestration.
name: Stepfun

description: Baichuan AI focuses on foundation models with strong performance on Chinese knowledge, long-context processing, and creative generation. Its models (Baichuan 4, Baichuan 3 Turbo, Baichuan 3 Turbo 128k) are optimized for different scenarios and offer strong value.
name: Baichuan

description: ByteDance’s model service platform offers secure, feature-rich, cost-competitive model access plus end-to-end tooling for data, fine-tuning, inference, and evaluation.
name: Volcengine

description: Volcengine Coding Plan from ByteDance provides access to multiple coding models including Doubao-Seed-Code, GLM-4.7, DeepSeek-V3.2, and Kimi-K2.5 via a fixed-fee subscription.
name: Volcengine Coding Plan

description: Founded in 2021, MiniMax builds general-purpose AI with multimodal foundation models, including trillion-parameter MoE text models, speech models, and vision models, along with apps like Hailuo AI.
name: Minimax

description: MiniMax Token Plan provides access to MiniMax models including M2.7 for coding tasks via a fixed-fee subscription.
name: MiniMax Token Plan

description: LM Studio is a desktop app for developing and experimenting with LLMs on your computer.
name: LM Studio

description: An open-source organization focused on large-model research and tooling, providing an efficient, easy-to-use platform that makes cutting-edge models and algorithms accessible.
name: InternLM

description: Higress is a cloud-native API gateway created inside Alibaba to address Tengine reload impact on long-lived connections and gaps in gRPC/Dubbo load balancing.
name: Higress

description: Gitee AI Serverless APIs provide plug-and-play LLM inference services for developers.
name: Gitee AI

description: A next-generation multimodal model from CASIA and the Wuhan Institute of AI, supporting multi-turn QA, writing, image generation, 3D understanding, and signal analysis with stronger cognition and creativity.
name: Taichu

description: 360 AI is a model and service platform from 360, offering NLP models like 360GPT2 Pro, 360GPT Pro, and 360GPT Turbo. The models combine large-scale parameters and multimodal capabilities for text generation, semantic understanding, chat, and code, with flexible pricing for diverse needs.
name: 360 AI

description: Search1API provides access to DeepSeek models with optional web connectivity, including standard and fast variants across multiple parameter sizes.
name: Search1API

description: Provides app developers with high-performance, easy-to-use, secure LLM services across the full workflow from model development to production deployment.
name: InfiniAI

description: Akash is a permissionless cloud resource marketplace with competitive pricing compared to traditional cloud providers.
name: AkashChat

description: Qiniu provides reliable, cost-effective real-time and batch AI inference services that are easy to use.
name: Qiniu

description: Replicate runs open-source image models like FLUX and Stable Diffusion via a simple cloud API.
name: Replicate

description: Nebius provides high-performance infrastructure for global AI innovators via large-scale GPU clusters and a vertically integrated cloud platform.
name: Nebius

description: CometAPI provides access to frontier models from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and more, letting users choose the best model and pricing for diverse use cases.
name: CometAPI

description: Vercel AI Gateway provides a unified API for 100+ models across OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and more, with budgeting, usage monitoring, load balancing, and failover.
name: Vercel AI Gateway

description: Cerebras is an inference platform built on its CS-3 system, focused on ultra-low latency and high-throughput LLM service for real-time workloads like code generation and agent tasks.
name: Cerebras

description: ZenMux is a unified AI aggregation platform that supports OpenAI, Anthropic, Google VertexAI, and more, with flexible routing to switch and manage models easily.
name: ZenMux

chatModels.description: Claude Haiku 3.5 by Anthropic — fast and cost-efficient model with vision support.
Claude Haiku 4.5 by Anthropic — next-gen Haiku with enhanced reasoning and vision.
Claude Opus 4.1 by Anthropic — premium reasoning model with deep analysis capabilities.
Claude Opus 4.5 by Anthropic — flagship model with top-tier reasoning and coding.
Claude Opus 4.6 by Anthropic — 1M context window flagship with advanced reasoning.
Claude Opus 4.7 by Anthropic — latest Opus with state-of-the-art reasoning and coding.
Claude Sonnet 4 by Anthropic — balanced model with strong coding and reasoning abilities.
Claude Sonnet 4.5 by Anthropic — improved Sonnet with enhanced coding performance.
Claude Sonnet 4.6 by Anthropic — latest Sonnet with superior coding and tool use.
Gemini 3 Flash by Google — ultra-fast model with multimodal input support.
Gemini 3.1 Pro by Google — premium multimodal model with 1M context window.
GLM-5 by Zhipu AI — high-performance coding model with strong reasoning abilities.
GLM-5.1 by Zhipu AI — latest generation coding model with enhanced reasoning.
GPT-5 by OpenAI — flagship model with advanced reasoning and multimodal input.
GPT-5 Codex by OpenAI — coding-specialized variant with tool use support.
GPT-5 Nano by OpenAI — lightweight and cost-efficient model.
GPT-5.1 by OpenAI — improved GPT-5 with better reasoning accuracy.
GPT-5.1 Codex by OpenAI — coding-focused variant with enhanced tool use.
GPT-5.1 Codex Max by OpenAI — maximum capability Codex variant.
GPT-5.1 Codex Mini by OpenAI — compact coding model with strong capabilities.
GPT-5.2 by OpenAI — upgraded reasoning and multimodal processing.
GPT-5.2 Codex by OpenAI — coding-specialized with improved tool call accuracy.
GPT-5.3 Codex by OpenAI — latest Codex with enhanced code understanding.
GPT-5.3 Codex Spark by OpenAI — compact coding model optimized for speed.
GPT-5.4 by OpenAI — next-gen model with 1M+ context window and multimodal input.
GPT-5.4 Mini by OpenAI — efficient model balancing cost and performance.
GPT-5.4 Nano by OpenAI — ultra-lightweight model for high-throughput tasks.
GPT-5.4 Pro by OpenAI — most capable model with maximum context and reasoning.
Kimi K2.5 by Moonshot AI — advanced reasoning model with image and video input support.
MiniMax M2.5 — efficient coding model with strong reasoning abilities.
MiniMax M2.5 Free — free tier coding model with full reasoning capabilities.
Nemotron 3 Super Free by Nvidia — free tier reasoning model with strong coding support.
Qwen3.5 Plus by Alibaba — cost-effective coding model with vision support.
Qwen3.6 Plus by Alibaba — latest Qwen coding model with enhanced reasoning and vision.
Big Pickle by OpenCode — free open-weights model with strong coding capabilities.

description: OpenCode Zen provides access to curated models from OpenAI, Anthropic, Moonshot, MiniMax, Zhipu, Qwen, and more via a single API key.
name: OpenCode Zen

description: OpenCode Go is a $10/month subscription providing reliable access to curated open coding models: GLM, Kimi, MiMo, Qwen, MiniMax.
name: OpenCode Go

description: Straico simplifies AI integration by providing a unified workspace that brings together top text, image, and audio generative AI models, empowering marketers, entrepreneurs, and enthusiasts with seamless access to diverse AI tools.
name: Straico

description: Xiaomi MiMo provides a conversational model service with an OpenAI-compatible API. The mimo-v2-flash model supports deep reasoning, streaming output, function calling, a 256K context window, and a maximum output of 128K.
name: Xiaomi MiMo

description: LongCat is a series of generative AI large models independently developed by Meituan. It is designed to enhance internal enterprise productivity and enable innovative applications through an efficient computational architecture and strong multimodal capabilities.
name: LongCat

description: StreamLake is an enterprise-level model service and AI computing cloud platform, integrating high-performance model inference, low-cost model customization, and fully-managed services to help enterprises focus on AI application innovation without worrying about the complexity and cost of underlying computing resources.
name: StreamLake
